info.title: Vomatt REST API
info.description: Vomatt會員系統 API 文檔，提供會員管理、身份驗證等功能。

tags.name: 認證
tags.description: 認證相關的API，包括登入、註冊、刷新令牌和登出

put.description: Update comment content (only by comment owner)

403.description: Forbidden - Only comment owner can update

delete.description: Delete a comment (soft delete, only by comment owner)

403.description: Forbidden - Only comment owner can delete

get.description: Retrieve all active votes with pagination

post.description: Create a new vote with multiple options
Cast vote(s) on the specified vote

get.description: Retrieve all comments for a vote (paginated)

post.description: Add a comment to a vote
Add a like to a comment

delete.description: Remove a like from a comment

400.description: 註冊資料無效，如用戶名已被使用

post.description: 會員登出系統並清除刷新令牌
使用電子郵件和驗證碼登入系統

429.description: 登入嘗試次數過多，請稍後再試

post.description: 重新發送預註冊驗證碼到指定郵箱

400.description: 無效的郵箱或驗證已過期

post.description: 使用刷新令牌獲取新的訪問令牌

403.description: 刷新令牌無效或已過期

post.description: 檢查用戶名和email是否已存在，生成驗證碼並發送郵件

200.description: 預註冊請求成功，驗證碼已發送

post.description: 產生認證碼並發送至指定 email
立即使當前JWT令牌失效，並清除刷新令牌。用於安全登出或強制終止會話。

get.description: 取得認證使用者的完整個人資料

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's display name and bio
更新公開個人資料的欄位顯示設定

get.description: Retrieve vote details by vote ID
Retrieve detailed vote results including voter information (if not anonymous)
Check if the authenticated user has voted and which options they selected
Retrieve votes created by the authenticated user (paginated)
Get a user's public profile by username
Search for users by username (case-insensitive, partial match)
取得系統中所有可用的標籤列表
依使用次數排序取得熱門標籤（分頁）

get.summary: 取得某 type 的所有 active 字典項目

get.description: 依父節點查詢某 type 下的子項目
回傳所有標記為 frontendUsing 的 active 字典，依 type 分組

delete.description: Remove vote from a specific option
Delete a user account (users can only delete their own account, admins can delete any account)

403.description: Forbidden - Users can only delete their own account

SigninRequest.description: 登入請求，包含電子郵件和驗證碼
